_comment: Merge custom models into built-in providers. pi-coding-agent's bundled pi-ai model list lags Anthropic releases; this adds Claude Opus 4.8 (May 2026) to the native anthropic provider so /model and defaultModel work without waiting for an upstream bump. See ~/.local/share/mise/installs/node/*/lib/node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/docs/models.md (Overriding Built-in Providers / merge semantics).
